stage1_existence_oracle.method: deterministic arXiv API id_list batch retrieval (+ WebSearch for the one non-arXiv paper)
stage1_existence_oracle.note: All post-training-cutoff papers (2025/2026: 2504.11343, 2504.13837, 2505.22617, 2509.04259, 2607.18725, 2502.18008, 2509.23350, 2606.09410, 2503.19206) resolved with matching titles/authors/years — parametric recall would have false-flagged them, which is exactly why the oracle is the load-bearing existence lens.

non_arxiv_verified.paper: Chord Jazzification (Chen, Fukayama, Goto, Su, ISMIR 2020)
non_arxiv_verified.claim_confirmed: the two-stage coloring→voicing process outperforms an end-to-end generation approach

attribution_corrections.as_cited: Inference Scaling fLaws: The Limits of LLM Resampling with Imperfect Verifiers
attribution_corrections.canonical_title: The Limits of Inference Scaling Through Resampling
attribution_corrections.action: title corrected in the dispatch; authors (Stroebl et al.) and year (2024) and finding unchanged

stage2_groundedness_jury.note: kimi-k2.7-code never parsed (tool-side output-parser flakiness); deepseek served batch 1, glm-5.2 served batch 2 — two disjoint frontier families across the 16 load-bearing claims.
stage2_groundedness_jury.uncertain_disposition: chord-jazzification retrieval-verified (WebSearch, reclassified CONFIRMED); raft-competitive-rl (Xiong 2025, post-cutoff — CORROBORATIVE, the load-bearing training-paradigm finding is RFT/Yuan which IS confirmed); narrow-sft-collapses-structure (Mitra 2026, post-cutoff — CORROBORATIVE, and it independently reproduces our OWN measured b2 format-collapse, which is the primary evidence).
stage2_groundedness_jury.honest_ceiling: A CONFIRMED on frontier-authored claims is corroboration, not proof; the panel reliably flags gross errors and is weaker on subtle ones. The retrieval oracle (existence) is the load-bearing gate; the jury adds groundedness where the papers are within its knowledge.

ensemble: retrieval oracle (arXiv/WebSearch) + deepseek-v4-pro + glm-5.2 = ≥3 decorrelated lenses, ≥2 different-family LLM lenses; 0 fabricated, 0 refuted.
halt_conditions_hit: none — no FABRICATED, no REFUTED; the 3 UNCERTAIN handled per the CANNOT_CONFIRM rule (retrieval-verified or demoted to corroborative, none silently load-bearing).
